text: I feel so happy today, everything is going great!
I got the job I always wanted!
Today was a wonderful day with my family.
I aced my exam, I'm so proud of myself!
I feel so lonely, nobody talks to me.
I have no one to share my feelings with.
Everyone seems to have friends except me.
I feel isolated and disconnected from the world.
I am so sad, I cried all night.
I lost someone I loved deeply.
Nothing feels right anymore, I feel empty.
I feel like giving up on everything.
I am so angry, I can't control myself.
They betrayed my trust and I'm furious.
I want to scream, everything is so unfair.
I hate how people treat me.
I have so many deadlines, I can't breathe.
Work is overwhelming me completely.
I haven't slept in days because of pressure.
Everything is piling up and I can't cope.
I keep worrying about things that might go wrong.
My heart races when I think about the future.
I feel nervous and scared all the time.
I can't stop overthinking every little thing.
Today was just a normal day, nothing special.
I went to the store and came back home.
I watched a movie and had dinner.
Nothing much happened today.
